General.Name: Solutions 30 SE
General.Description: Solutions 30 SE provides support solutions for new digital technologies in Benelux, France, Spain, Italy, Germany, Portugal, Poland, and the United Kingdom. The company offers telecom support services, including installation, assistance using communications equipment, deployment of telecommunication infrastructure, maintenance, and logistics. It also provides IT solutions, such as installation and maintenance of IT hardware, IT infrastructure, and servers; implementation of automatized robotic processes; deployment and maintenance of Internet of Things; TOTEM/KIOSK design, manufacturing, installation, and maintenance; console creation for data analytics; and logistics of spare parts and systems. In addition, the company offers energy solutions, including installs and maintains smart meters; charging stations for electric vehicles; photovoltaic power plants for professional and residential markets; smart appliances comprising thermostats, light bulbs, plugs, and sensors; and L/H gas converters, as well as logistics services. Further, it offers retail and security solutions, such as installation, maintenance, and remote troubleshooting of POS equipment, digital signs; store digital infrastructure deployment; cabling; installs wired and wireless connectivity, access control systems, and intrusion alarm systems; deploys fire alarm systems and video/CCTV. Additionally, the company offers rail solution, including fiber optic cables; signalling solutions; train station upgrades and maintenance, such as cabling, solar panels, and in-train and train station WiFi; and upgrade of trackside, rolling stock, and rail crossing hardware. Solutions 30 SE was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Luxembourg.
General.Address: 21, rue du Puits Romain, Luxembourg, Luxembourg, 8070
